mapper.sql: id, drug_code, barcode, name, pinyin, specification, category, dosage_form, otc, invoice_item, unit, pack_unit, base_ratio, base_unit, dose_ratio, dose_unit, purchase_price, sell_price, manufacturer, approval_no, status, warning_stock, stock_min, stock_max, location_no, expiry_warning_days, allow_split, allow_member_discount, usage_method, single_dose, frequency, default_days, default_total, total_unit, description, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_drug WHERE deleted = 0
AND (drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

sql.if: AND (drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

choose.when: AND NOT ( COALESCE(category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' )
AND ( COALESCE(category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM clinic_drug WHERE deleted = 0
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_drug WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clinic_drug WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clinic_drug WHERE drug_code = #{drugCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(CAST(drug_code AS UNSIGNED)) FROM clinic_drug WHERE drug_code REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'

SELECT d.id, d.drug_code AS drugCode, d.name, d.specification, d.category, d.manufacturer, d.unit, COALESCE(d.sell_price, 0) AS sellPrice, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(i.quantity, 0)), 0) AS stockQuantity, COALESCE( GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(COALESCE(i.quantity, 0), COALESCE(i.unit, d.unit, '')) ORDER BY i.id SEPARATOR ' ' ), CONCAT(0, COALESCE(d.unit, '')) ) AS stockText FROM clinic_drug d LEFT JOIN clinic_inventory i ON i.deleted = 0 AND (i.drug_id = d.id OR ((i.drug_id IS NULL OR i.drug_id = 0) AND i.drug_code = d.drug_code)) WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND (d.status IS NULL OR UPPER(d.status) = 'ENABLED' OR d.status = '启用')
AND (d.drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY d.id, d.drug_code, d.name, d.specification, d.category, d.manufacturer, d.unit, d.sell_price ORDER BY d.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_drug ( drug_code, barcode, name, pinyin, specification, category, dosage_form, otc, invoice_item, unit, pack_unit, base_ratio, base_unit, dose_ratio, dose_unit, purchase_price, sell_price, manufacturer, approval_no, status, warning_stock, stock_min, stock_max, location_no, expiry_warning_days, allow_split, allow_member_discount, usage_method, single_dose, frequency, default_days, default_total, total_unit, description, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{drugCode}, #{barcode}, #{name}, #{pinyin}, #{specification}, #{category}, #{dosageForm}, #{otc}, #{invoiceItem}, #{unit}, #{packUnit}, #{baseRatio}, #{baseUnit}, #{doseRatio}, #{doseUnit}, #{purchasePrice}, #{sellPrice}, #{manufacturer}, #{approvalNo}, #{status}, #{warningStock}, #{stockMin}, #{stockMax}, #{locationNo}, #{expiryWarningDays}, #{allowSplit}, #{allowMemberDiscount}, #{usageMethod}, #{singleDose}, #{frequency}, #{defaultDays}, #{defaultTotal}, #{totalUnit}, #{description}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_drug
drug_code = #{drugCode}, barcode = #{barcode}, name = #{name}, pinyin = #{pinyin}, specification = #{specification}, category = #{category}, dosage_form = #{dosageForm}, otc = #{otc}, invoice_item = #{invoiceItem}, unit = #{unit}, pack_unit = #{packUnit}, base_ratio = #{baseRatio}, base_unit = #{baseUnit}, dose_ratio = #{doseRatio}, dose_unit = #{doseUnit}, purchase_price = #{purchasePrice}, sell_price = #{sellPrice}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, approval_no = #{approvalNo}, status = #{status}, warning_stock = #{warningStock}, stock_min = #{stockMin}, stock_max = #{stockMax}, location_no = #{locationNo}, expiry_warning_days = #{expiryWarningDays}, allow_split = #{allowSplit}, allow_member_discount = #{allowMemberDiscount}, usage_method = #{usageMethod}, single_dose = #{singleDose}, frequency = #{frequency}, default_days = #{defaultDays}, default_total = #{defaultTotal}, total_unit = #{totalUnit}, description = #{description}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
